reason: cannot create behavioral tests: Bun is not available to compile TypeScript. Without Bun, tests cannot actually execute compareBranch to verify the fix. Behavioral tests (test_null_proto_map_operations_work etc.) run their own correct code but pass on NOP (reward=1) because they don't test the actual assert.ts. Grep-based tests that check for SafeMapPrototypeSet are necessary to verify the fix is present, but were flagged as too tight. Without Bun, no behavioral test can distinguish buggy vs fixed code.
